title: Multicenter iEEG dataset for classification of graphoelements and artifactual signals (FNUSA)
description: A multicenter intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) dataset comprising segmented 3-second single-channel clips from epilepsy patients, annotated for graphoelement classification and artifact detection. The dataset includes clinical metadata such as seizure onset zone (SOZ) flags, electrode anatomy, and reviewer annotations, making it suitable for developing and validating automated signal classification algorithms in clinical neurophysiology.
methods_description: iEEG data were recorded from patient-specific subdural and depth electrodes and segmented into independent 3-second single-channel clips. The clips were resampled to 5000 Hz and concatenated by subject and electrode contact. Original labels, segment identifiers, anatomical locations, reviewer identifiers, SOZ flags, and electrode types were preserved in event annotations.
